summary: Iteration 73 tested the new EN 1090 Scheda Rintracciabilità Materiali feature. All 12 backend tests passed. Fixed frontend URL mismatch (/api/commessa-ops/ → /api/commesse/). Frontend testing confirmed all new UI fields are present and working.

integration_issues.issue: FIXED - Frontend was calling /api/commessa-ops/{cid}/scheda-rintracciabilita-pdf but backend route is at /api/commesse/{cid}/scheda-rintracciabilita-pdf

critical_code_review_comments: PreventivoCreate/PreventivoUpdate models correctly include numero_disegno and ingegnere_disegno fields (lines 66-67, 87-88 in preventivi.py)
MaterialBatchCreate model includes new fields: posizione, n_pezzi, numero_certificato, ddt_numero, disegno_numero (lines 38-44 in models/fpc.py)
FPC batch create/update routes correctly handle new fields (lines 125-149, 152-178 in routes/fpc.py)
PDF generation service uses WeasyPrint with landscape A4 format (pdf_scheda_rintracciabilita.py)
_extract_profile_base correctly extracts base profiles like IPE100 from various formats (lines 1442-1464 in commessa_ops.py)
Cascade delete removes lotti_cam by colata numbers from certificate metadata (lines 1227-1245 in commessa_ops.py)
Frontend CommessaOpsPanel.js correctly displays all new batch fields in Tracciabilità section (lines 948-988)
seed_data_creation: Created test preventivi, material batches, commesse, and documents for testing. All cleaned up after tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 73 adds Scheda Rintracciabilità Materiali feature for EN 1090 compliance. Key endpoints: POST/PUT /api/preventivi now accept numero_disegno and ingegnere_disegno. POST/PUT /api/fpc/batches accept posizione, n_pezzi, numero_certificato, ddt_numero, disegno_numero. GET /api/commesse/{cid}/scheda-rintracciabilita-pdf generates PDF report. Frontend fix applied: URL changed from /api/commessa-ops/ to /api/commesse/.

fpc_batch_create_with_new_fields.details: POST /api/fpc/batches creates batch with posizione, n_pezzi, numero_certificato, ddt_numero, disegno_numero

extract_profile_base_function.details: _extract_profile_base correctly extracts IPE100 from 'Trave IPE 100 in S275 JR', 'IPE 100X55X4.1', HEB200, UPN120, etc.

cascade_delete_by_colata.details: Deleting certificate document cascades to delete linked lotti_cam by colata number

frontend_preventivo_disegno_fields.details: PreventivoEditorPage shows N. Disegno and Redatto dall'Ing. input fields in Riferimento tab

frontend_tracciabilita_new_fields.details: CommessaOpsPanel Tracciabilità section displays N. Certificato, DDT N., Posizione, N. Pezzi fields

frontend_scheda_pdf_button.details: Scheda Rintracciabilità PDF button visible and functional when batches exist

bug_fix_applied.issue: Frontend URL mismatch for Scheda Rintracciabilità PDF
